headline: Why Blackstone (BX) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of alternative investment manager Blackstone (NYSE:BX) jumped 3.3% in the afternoon session after major banks and asset managers reported first-quarter earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations.
